segments.text: But instead of spotdodging, they went with directional airdodge away
segments.original_text: ですが、その場回避ではなく、外側回避を選んだ

segments.text: They stayed composed with a clean back airdodge
segments.original_text: 焦らなかったですね、冷静に後ろ回避しました

segments.text: To the slightly mistimed up smash
segments.original_text: わずかにタイミングが遅れたその上スマッシュに

segments.text: He connects with the precise hit confirm
segments.original_text: 的確な確認を合わせてきましたが

full_text: But instead of spotdodging, they went with directional airdodge away They stayed composed with a clean back airdodge To the slightly mistimed up smash He connects with the precise hit confirm And that's the KO!

corrections.original: 的確な拡大を味わってきましたが
corrections.corrected: 的確な確認を合わせてきましたが
